claim.observation: fls of the volume root lists modern-Windows directories: 'Users', 'OneDriveTemp', 'Windows10Upgrade', 'Windows.old', and '$Recycle.Bin'. None of these are present on a Windows XP installation.
claim.interpretation: The installed operating system on this volume is Windows 10 (the 'Users', 'OneDriveTemp', 'Windows10Upgrade' and 'Windows.old' layout is a Windows 10 profile/upgrade structure, not Windows XP). The 'Version: Windows XP' string reported by fsstat in F-analyst-ROCBA-DISK-001 is the NTFS on-disk format version (NTFS 3.1, first shipped with XP) and not the OS edition; that earlier finding's OS wording should be read with this correction.
